## Checklist

- [ ] Code has been tested manually
- [ ] README / documentation has been updated if needed
- [ ] No temporary or unrelated files included
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] `install.sh` works correctly (if installer was changed)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or API keys
- [ ] Version bump completed per `docs/release-checklist.md` if releasing
